name: explain_project_goal
prompt: Explain the main goal of this repository in one paragraph, using only defensible claims from the project files.
success_criteria: The answer should identify the repo as a Mac-first local coding harness for small 4-bit models, mention repo-aware workflows, runtime profiles, safe tools, and slow-compute improvement. It should avoid claiming frontier-level general intelligence.

name: suggest_safe_next_feature
prompt: Suggest the next feature this repository should implement to get closer to frontier-model coding results on local models.
success_criteria: The answer should propose a concrete measurable feature, prefer repo-context/eval/verification improvements over vague agent features, and include a verification plan.
